text: Something changed. A state transitioned.
Energy moved from one place to another.
Two things interacted. A result followed.
An object was observed. The observation altered the system.
A signal arrived. Something responded.
The pattern continued. Then it stopped.
Input was received. Output was produced.
A threshold was crossed. Behaviour shifted.
Forces balanced. The system stabilised.
A boundary condition changed. The interior reorganised.
Memory retained a trace. Later retrieval was possible.
Repetition occurred. A cycle completed.
An anomaly appeared in the sequence. It was later absorbed.
The rate slowed. Then it accelerated again.
A connection formed between two distant nodes.
Information was compressed then expanded.
The system reached a local minimum. It explored further.
Two streams merged. A new stream emerged downstream.
Noise was present. Signal was extracted from it.
A parameter drifted. The output drifted in a correlated way.
The context shifted. The same input produced a different output.
A structure persisted despite perturbation. It was stable.
A small change at the beginning propagated into a large difference later.
The boundary between two regions became sharper over time.
Resources were allocated. Some areas grew, others shrank.
A relation was discovered. It was not explicitly provided.
The whole differed from the sum of its parts.
An earlier event influenced a later one through an indirect path.
Something was absent. Its absence carried information.
The process reversed. What was built was dismantled.
A hidden variable explained the observed correlation.
Parallel processes converged on the same result.
The same structure appeared at multiple scales.
An interaction occurred. No trace was left, yet the state changed.
A prediction was made. The prediction influenced the outcome.
The system adapted to an unseen constraint.
Two entities diverged from a common origin.
An internal representation formed. It was not reflected in the output.
The gradient pointed in a direction. Movement followed.
Something completed a loop and returned to its starting state, slightly changed.
